full_quote:
Kyle is one of the coolest guys I have met in my professional life.
  I have witnessed and am not hesitant to endorse several of his abilities: To create amazing designs and interfaces, to visualize complex concepts and ideas into easy-to-understand materials, to put different pieces of information into a robust business model that management can work on, to lead and mentor the team to achieve better performance and team goals for the company. I am fully confident that he is a strong leader who can make a significant positive impact on both top and bottom lines of the company.
name: Steven Aung Soe Min
